# growthbook_members (Data Source)

Read the list of organization members. Members are managed via the GrowthBook invite/SSO flow and are read-only in Terraform.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `members` (Attributes List) All members of the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) Member email address.
- `environments` (List of String) Environments the member is limited to, if any.
- `global_role` (String) Organization-wide role.
- `id` (String) Member user ID.
- `last_login_date` (String) Last login timestamp (RFC3339).
- `name` (String) Member name.
- `teams` (List of String) Team IDs the member belongs to.
